title: ClaudemdSizeReport
description: Output of bin/check-claude-md-size.sh — CLAUDE.md size budget check + per-section breakdown for the largest extract candidates. Consumed by bin/compute-drift.sh (folded into the documentation block of DriftReport).

oneOf.title: ClaudemdSizeAbsent
oneOf.description: Emitted when no CLAUDE.md exists at the target path.

oneOf.title: ClaudemdSizePresent
oneOf.description: Emitted when CLAUDE.md exists; status reflects whether it fits the soft / hard budget.

status.description: 'ok' = under soft budget; 'warn' = over soft, under hard; 'error' = over hard cap.

sections.description: Top-level `## ` sections sorted by byte size (descending). Empty when python3 is unavailable.

recommendation.description: Human-readable suggestion for the user (typically points at the largest extract candidates).
